name: Daily
description: Daily.co programmable video and audio infrastructure for real-time communication

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Daily.co
2. Go to Developers → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Daily → Developers → API Keys → Create API Key
